issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Effect trashes from deck (top), not hand. Should use appropriate deck-trash action or custom implementation.
Missing condition: action is optional ('You may'). Requires condition or choice mechanism.
Missing power boost action: 'Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2 cost during this turn' is not implemented. Requires PowerBoost or equivalent with target selection and duration.
Duration missing: 'during this turn' indicates DuringYourTurn scope for the cost reduction effect.
